_doc.purpose: Localization companion for Chara_Status.json. Holds en-us entries added/updated after the source file's zh-cn text was authored, so the source file itself doesn't need to be touched again for translation-only changes.
_doc.chara_status_fatigue_note: zh-cn source for chara_status_fatigue was renamed from 疲劳 (Fatigue) to 体力 (Stamina) - the status is now named after the Stamina resource it tracks (see stats_derived_extended_stamina, also 'Stamina') rather than the negative condition. The stale 'Fatigue' en-us entry was removed from Chara_Status.json and replaced here.

en-us.chara_status_fatigue_tooltip: This value is the character's current %%stats_derived_extended_stamina%% as a percentage. When it drops too low, the character becomes fatigued, lowering Mood.
en-us.chara_status_pain_tooltip: Strong pain or higher renders the character unable to act.
